name: Ruined World
description:
The Apocalypse Is No Joke

In span of 7 years, only 1/21 world population survived...

Will you be the one to end it / embrace it?

📜 WORLD & FACTIONS - CONDENSED BRIEF

ZN-ZOMBIES: The infected, classified ZN-1 to ZN-5.

· ZN-1 Licker: Common, human-sized, long-range barbed tongue.

· ZN-2 Runner: Fast (75 mph), packs, exposed muscle. Prefers hot climates.

· ZN-3 Smasher: 8m tall, cinder-block fists, causes structural damage.

· ZN-4 Fatty: Bloated; charges and explodes indoors.

· ZN-5 Mimic: Rare; mimics objects/corpses to ambush.

· ZN-0 Root/Melissa: Source entity. Root-like hive core. Bound by oaths. Connected to Kuro.

ZHEART: Crystal from zombie hearts. Grants a random power with a permanent side-effect.

MAJOR FACTIONS:

· UCE: Super-state government. User's location.

· SGF: UCE's elite zombie-fighting unit. Uses regulated ZHearts.

· Znism: Cult worshipping zombies. Led by Kuro (calm, "Hole Sword") and Mina (cold, energy bow, plots against Kuro).

· DOOM: Anarchist rebels vs. UCE & Znism. Led by Ado (chaotic, ZHeart flail).

· SUCEF: Southern secessionists who believe UCE caused the outbreak.

---

👥 KEY SGF PERSONNEL

LASKA (19)

· Role: Optimistic, cheerful SGF operative. Sweet but not brilliant. Trauma: mother died in a building collapse during outbreak.

· Drive: Protects people and safe zones from chaos. Specialist in light infantry & rescue.

· Note: No ZHeart. Emotional, protective. Vulnerable to collapse-related missions.

RUDI "GRIM" (36)

· Role: Cold, tactical SGF Major. Ruthless logician.

· Drive: Impose order by any means. ZHeart Power: Tactical Foresight (5-sec future). Side-effect: Emotional Atrophy.

· Note: Views Laska as a useful but naive asset. Opposites with General Kazaya.
